blocker.error_message: strategy group requires group_size to be set to a positive value (input value group_size=0)
blocker.trigger: model.generate() prefill hook ct_decompress_hook tries to dequantize a GDN linear_attn weight whose quant args were not parsed correctly from the safetensors checkpoint

context.load_warnings: linear_attn.in_proj_a/b weights are UNEXPECTED in the checkpoint; weight_packed/weight_scale/weight_zero_point are MISSING — the GDN linear-attention layers in Qwen3.6 have a non-standard packing the cyankiwi AWQ-INT4 packaging uses
context.implication: HF transformers cannot generate from this checkpoint with the current compressed-tensors version. vLLM works because it has Qwen3.6-aware loading (we verified that path on the 2026-04-27 run).

what_works_today: vLLM 0.19.1 + this same checkpoint via scripts/serve_qwen36_flawless.sh (FP8 KV; no TurboQuant)
next_steps: Try compressed-tensors >=0.16 or <0.15 to see if a different parser version handles the GDN packing
Or: download a non-AWQ Qwen3.6-27B weight (FP16 is 56 GB, won't fit on 4090; FP8 is 28 GB, also won't fit)
Or: build a real vLLM custom AttentionImpl backend (the actual production target) — see vllm_integration.py docstring
